demo_mode.name: AI Airport Companion - Investor/Presentation Demo
demo_mode.description: One-click scenario loader that seeds the app with a curated, repeatable dataset slice for live demos.

scenarios.label: Evening Rush Hour
scenarios.description: Loads 18:00-20:00 window with high security/immigration congestion and ~70% parking occupancy across all zones.
expected_alerts: security_checkpoint: HIGH congestion - suggest opening 2 extra lanes
parking Zone B: 78% full - rush predicted to peak at 19:00

scenarios.label: Weather-Driven Delay
scenarios.description: Loads a storm-condition window showing flight delay predictions and a 'leave earlier' passenger recommendation.

scenarios.label: Calm Early Morning
scenarios.description: Loads a low-traffic baseline window (04:00-06:00) to contrast against the rush-hour scenario.

demo_mode.reset_behavior: Re-running the loader resets all demo session state and reloads this manifest; does not affect real data.
